ov_overview_body.en: Six Flags Magic Mountain is the Thrill Capital of the World, located in Valencia, California, 45 minutes north of Los Angeles. The park holds the world record for the most roller coasters at a single theme park with 20 coasters including the unique 4th-dimension X2, the record-breaking Superman: Escape from Krypton, the towering Tatsu flying coaster and the innovative Wonder Woman single-rail coaster. Six Flags Magic Mountain has been challenging Universal Studios Hollywood for Los Angeles area thrill supremacy since 1971 and remains the greatest collection of extreme roller coasters at any single park in the world.
ov_overview_body.es: Six Flags Magic Mountain es la Capital de la Emocion del Mundo en Valencia, California. Tiene el record mundial de mas montanas rusas en un solo parque con 20 coasters incluyendo X2, Superman y Tatsu.
ov_overview_body.fr: Six Flags Magic Mountain est la Capitale du Frisson du Monde a Valencia, Californie. Il detient le record mondial du plus de montagnes russes dans un seul parc avec 20 coasters.
ov_overview_body.de: Six Flags Magic Mountain ist die Thrill Capital of the World in Valencia, Kalifornien. Es halt den Weltrekord fur die meisten Achterbahnen in einem einzigen Park mit 20 Coastern.
ov_overview_body.it: Six Flags Magic Mountain e la Capitale del Brivido del Mondo a Valencia, California. Detiene il record mondiale per il maggior numero di montagne russe in un unico parco con 20 coaster.
ov_overview_body.nl: Six Flags Magic Mountain is de Thrill Capital of the World in Valencia, Californie. Het houdt het wereldrecord voor de meeste achtbanen in een enkel park met 20 achtbanen.
ov_overview_body.pt: Six Flags Magic Mountain e a Capital do Frisson do Mundo em Valencia, California. Tem o record mundial de mais montanhas-russas num unico parque com 20 coasters.
ov_overview_body.ru: Six Flags Magic Mountain — столица адреналина в Валенсии, Калифорния. 20 горок.
ov_overview_body.zh: 六旗魔法山是世界刺激之都，位于加州瓦伦西亚。拥有20座过山车，创世界纪录。
ov_overview_body.ar: Six Flags Magic Mountain عاصمة الإثارة في Valencia. أكثر 20 achtbaan في متنزه واحد.

ov_highlights_body.en: X2 is the world's only 4th-dimension coaster where seats rotate independently — the most unique coaster on Earth. Tatsu is the world's tallest fastest longest flying coaster. Superman: Escape from Krypton was the first coaster to break 100 mph in 1997. Wonder Woman Flight of Courage is the world's tallest and longest single-rail coaster. Full Throttle features the world's largest vertical loop. Goliath is one of the finest hyper coasters in California. Riddler's Revenge is the world's tallest fastest stand-up coaster.
ov_highlights_body.es: X2 es el unico coaster 4D del mundo. Tatsu es el flying coaster mas alto rapido y largo. Superman fue el primero en superar las 100 mph. Wonder Woman es el single-rail mas alto y largo. Full Throttle tiene el loop vertical mas grande del mundo.
ov_highlights_body.fr: X2 est le seul coaster 4D au monde. Tatsu est le flying coaster le plus haut rapide et long. Superman fut le premier a depasser les 100 mph. Wonder Woman est le single-rail le plus haut et long. Full Throttle a le plus grand loop vertical au monde.
ov_highlights_body.de: X2 ist der einzige 4D-Coaster der Welt. Tatsu ist der hochste schnellste langste Flying-Coaster. Superman war der erste der 100 mph uberschritt. Wonder Woman ist der hochste und langste Single-Rail. Full Throttle hat den weltgrossten Vertikalloop.
ov_highlights_body.it: X2 e l unico coaster 4D al mondo. Tatsu e il flying coaster piu alto rapido e lungo. Superman fu il primo a superare le 100 mph. Wonder Woman e il single-rail piu alto e lungo. Full Throttle ha il loop verticale piu grande al mondo.
ov_highlights_body.nl: X2 is de enige 4D achtbaan ter wereld. Tatsu is de hoogste snelste langste flying coaster. Superman was de eerste die 100 mph brak. Wonder Woman is de hoogste en langste single-rail. Full Throttle heeft de grootste verticale loop ter wereld.
ov_highlights_body.pt: X2 e o unico coaster 4D do mundo. Tatsu e o flying coaster mais alto rapido e longo. Superman foi o primeiro a superar as 100 mph. Wonder Woman e o single-rail mais alto e longo. Full Throttle tem o maior loop vertical do mundo.
ov_highlights_body.ru: X2 — единственный 4D-коастер. Tatsu — летящий коастер рекорд.
ov_highlights_body.zh: X2是全球唯一的四维过山车。塔律是全球最高最快最长的飞行过山车。
ov_highlights_body.ar: X2 هو achtbaan رباعي الأبعاد الوحيد في العالم.

ov_did_you_know_body.en: Six Flags Magic Mountain opened in 1971 and has more roller coasters than any other park in the world. Revolution was the world's first modern looping coaster in 1976 and appeared in the 1977 film Rollercoaster. Superman: Escape from Krypton was the first coaster to reach 100 mph in 1997. X2 opened in 2002 as the world's first 4th-dimension coaster. The park holds multiple Guinness World Records. Tatsu's pretzel loop is one of the most intense inversion elements on any flying coaster. Wonder Woman Flight of Courage opened in 2022 as the world's tallest single-rail coaster.
ov_did_you_know_body.es: Six Flags Magic Mountain abrio en 1971 y tiene mas montanas rusas que cualquier otro parque del mundo. Revolution fue el primer coaster moderno con loop en 1976 y aparecio en la pelicula de 1977. Superman fue el primer coaster en alcanzar las 100 mph en 1997.
ov_did_you_know_body.fr: Six Flags Magic Mountain a ouvert en 1971 et a plus de montagnes russes que tout autre parc au monde. Revolution etait le premier coaster moderne a boucle en 1976 et est apparu dans le film de 1977. Superman fut le premier coaster a atteindre les 100 mph en 1997.
ov_did_you_know_body.de: Six Flags Magic Mountain eroffnete 1971 und hat mehr Achterbahnen als jeder andere Park. Revolution war 1976 der erste moderne Looping-Coaster und erschien im Film von 1977. Superman war 1997 der erste Coaster der 100 mph erreichte.
ov_did_you_know_body.it: Six Flags Magic Mountain apri nel 1971 e ha piu montagne russe di qualsiasi altro parco. Revolution fu il primo coaster moderno con loop nel 1976 e appare nel film del 1977. Superman fu il primo coaster a raggiungere le 100 mph nel 1997.
ov_did_you_know_body.nl: Six Flags Magic Mountain opende in 1971 en heeft meer achtbanen dan enig ander park. Revolution was in 1976 de eerste moderne looping achtbaan en verscheen in de film van 1977. Superman was in 1997 de eerste achtbaan die 100 mph bereikte.
ov_did_you_know_body.pt: Six Flags Magic Mountain abriu em 1971 e tem mais montanhas-russas do que qualquer outro parque. Revolution foi o primeiro coaster moderno com loop em 1976 e apareceu no filme de 1977. Superman foi o primeiro coaster a atingir as 100 mph em 1997.
ov_did_you_know_body.ru: Six Flags Magic Mountain открылся в 1971 г. Revolution — первый модерный лопинг-коастер 1976 г.
ov_did_you_know_body.zh: 六旗魔法山于1971年开放。革命是1976年第一座现代循环过山车。超人1997年立下了速度纪录。
ov_did_you_know_body.ar: Six Flags Magic Mountain افتتح 1971. Revolution كان أول achtbaan حلقية حديثة 1976.

ov_plan_body.en: Arrive at opening and head straight to X2 — it has the longest queue in the park and frequently closes during the day. Tatsu second, then Superman. Wonder Woman and Full Throttle are best mid-morning. Goliath is great for evening rides with shorter queues. The park is busiest on weekends and during school holidays. Flash Pass is strongly recommended. The park has spectacular mountain views especially beautiful at golden hour. Buy tickets online in advance for the best price.
ov_plan_body.es: Llega a la apertura y ve directamente a X2. Tatsu segundo, luego Superman. Wonder Woman y Full Throttle son mejores a media manana. Goliath es excelente para las tardes. Flash Pass muy recomendado.
ov_plan_body.fr: Arrivez a l ouverture et allez directement a X2. Tatsu deuxieme puis Superman. Wonder Woman et Full Throttle sont mieux en milieu de matinee. Flash Pass fortement recommande.
ov_plan_body.de: Kommen Sie zur Eroffnung und gehen Sie direkt zu X2. Tatsu zweiter dann Superman. Wonder Woman und Full Throttle am besten vormittags. Flash Pass dringend empfohlen.
ov_plan_body.it: Arriva all apertura e vai direttamente a X2. Tatsu secondo poi Superman. Wonder Woman e Full Throttle meglio a meta mattina. Flash Pass fortemente consigliato.
ov_plan_body.nl: Kom bij opening en ga direct naar X2. Tatsu tweede dan Superman. Wonder Woman en Full Throttle het best midden in de ochtend. Flash Pass sterk aanbevolen.
ov_plan_body.pt: Chega na abertura e vai directamente a X2. Tatsu segundo depois Superman. Wonder Woman e Full Throttle melhores a meio da manha. Flash Pass fortemente recomendado.
ov_plan_body.ru: Приходите к открытию. X2 — первым. Flash Pass рекомендуется.
ov_plan_body.zh: 开园时到达直接前往X2。塔律第二，超人第三。建议Flash Pass。
ov_plan_body.ar: اذهب مباشرة لـ X2. Flash Pass موصى به بشدة.

ov_photos_body.en: X2 photographed from below during the rotating drop against the California sky is the defining image of Magic Mountain. Tatsu photographed from below showing riders in flying position against the mountain backdrop is extraordinary. Superman photographed at the launch moment from ground level is iconic. The park photographed from Samurai Summit at sunset with the Santa Clarita Valley spread below is spectacular. Full Throttle photographed inside the vertical loop with riders visible overhead is uniquely dramatic.
ov_photos_body.es: X2 fotografiado desde abajo durante la caida rotatoria es la imagen definitiva de Magic Mountain. Tatsu desde abajo mostrando jinetes en posicion de vuelo es extraordinario. Superman en el momento del lanzamiento es iconico.
ov_photos_body.fr: X2 photographie depuis le bas pendant la chute rotative est l image definitive de Magic Mountain. Tatsu depuis le bas montrant les cavaliers en position de vol est extraordinaire. Superman au moment du lancement est iconique.
ov_photos_body.de: X2 von unten beim rotierenden Abfall ist das definitive Bild von Magic Mountain. Tatsu von unten mit Fahrern in Flugposition ist aussergewohnlich. Superman beim Startmoment ist ikonisch.
ov_photos_body.it: X2 fotografato dal basso durante la caduta rotante e l immagine definitiva di Magic Mountain. Tatsu dal basso con cavalieri in posizione di volo e straordinario. Superman al momento del lancio e iconico.
ov_photos_body.nl: X2 van onderaf tijdens de draaiende val is het definitieve beeld van Magic Mountain. Tatsu van onderaf met rijders in vliegpositie is buitengewoon. Superman op het startmoment is iconisch.
ov_photos_body.pt: X2 fotografado de baixo durante a queda rotatoria e a imagem definitiva de Magic Mountain. Tatsu de baixo com cavaleiros em posicao de voo e extraordinario. Superman no momento do lancamento e iconico.
ov_photos_body.zh: X2从下方拍摄是魔法山的标志性影像。
ov_photos_body.ar: X2 من الأسفل هو الصورة المحددة لـ Magic Mountain.
